_readme: Copy this file to rules/homebrew.json and replace the examples with
entries typed from books YOU own (Tasha's, Xanathar's, homebrew, ...).
Loaded at backend startup into the same table as the SRD, so shops,
equipment guardrails, and the DM's exact-numbers context all see them.
Required per item: name + desc. Everything else optional:
category, item_type, rarity, cost_gp, weight, requires_attunement,

items.name: Example: Lantern of the Patient Moth
items.desc: REPLACE ME - an original example entry. Sheds dim light that insects and beasts of CR 1/4 or lower will not cross. 3 charges, regains 1d3 at dawn.

items.name: Example: Wardens' Chain Whip
items.desc: REPLACE ME - +1 weapon; on a hit you may attempt to grapple (escape DC 13) instead of dealing damage.
